path: PNGS/Whoever is at war with Panjtan is at war with Aqa ﷺ.png
text: Imam Tirmidhi (rahimahullah) has recorded this Hadith on the authority of Sayyiduna Zayd ibn Argam (radiyallahu ‘anhu). Sayyiduna Zayd ibn Argam (radiyallahu ‘anhu) reported that Rasulullah (sallallahu ‘alayhi wa sallam) told ‘Ali, Fatimah, Hasan and Husayn (radiyallahu “anhum): “l am at war with whoever is at war with you and at peace with whoever you make peace with." (Sunan Tirmidhi, Hadith: 3870. Imam Ibn Majah (rahimahullah) has recorded the Hadith with variations in the wording, Hadith: 145) Imam Ibn Hibban (rahimahullah) has declared the Hadith authentic. (Sahih Ibn Hibban; Al lhsan, Hadith: 6977)
